name: Stardust Wurm
name_jp: スターダスト・ヴルム
desc: If this card is in your hand or GY, and you control a Level 8 or higher Dragon Synchro Monster: You can Special Summon this card, but banish it when it leaves the field. You can Tribute this card; Special Summon up to 2 Level 1 LIGHT Dragon monsters from your hand and/or GY, except "Stardust Wurm", but their effects cannot be activated. You can only use each effect of "Stardust Wurm" once per turn.
mnst_eff: If this card is in your hand or GY, and you control a Level 8 or higher Dragon Synchro Monster: You can Special Summon this card, but banish it when it leaves the field. You can Tribute this card; Special Summon up to 2 Level 1 LIGHT Dragon monsters from your hand and/or GY, except "Stardust Wurm", but their effects cannot be activated. You can only use each effect of "Stardust Wurm" once per turn.
eff: If this card is in your hand or GY, and you control a Level 8 or higher Dragon Synchro Monster: You can Special Summon this card, but banish it when it leaves the field. You can Tribute this card; Special Summon up to 2 Level 1 LIGHT Dragon monsters from your hand and/or GY, except "Stardust Wurm", but their effects cannot be activated. You can only use each effect of "Stardust Wurm" once per turn.

jp_sets.set: The Valuable Book EX 2 promotional cards

mst: Prevents activation of your Effect Monsters
summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
Special Summons itself from your Graveyard
banished: Banishes itself when it leaves the field
misc: Requires control of specific Monster card type
